hero.headline: Find the right faculty for you at Kasetsart University in just 3 minutes
hero.searchPlaceholder: ⭐ Which faculty interests you? Or ask 'Recommend programs and faculties'

card1.title: Super Easy
card1.body: No repetitive forms. Just take a short test and our AI will analyze everything automatically.

card2.title: Real Data
card2.body: Pulls curriculum and admission requirements directly from Kasetsart University. 100% reliable.

card3.title: Actually Helpful
card3.body: Gives personalized recommendations based on your traits and interests, addressing your faculty selection concerns.

programs.heading: Popular programs for students like you
programs.subheading: Based on your latest interest analysis

howItWorks.heading: How KUru Works
howItWorks.subheading: Just a few simple steps to discover your path

step1.title: Share Interests
step1.body: Take the RIASEC test to reveal your interests and personality.

step2.title: AI Analysis
step2.body: Our AI clusters and matches you with the most suitable curriculum data.

step3.title: Get Recommendations
step3.body: Receive a ranked list of faculties and programs best suited for you.

step4.title: Prepare to Apply
step4.body: Access the latest TCAS data and get help preparing your portfolio.
